message:
feat: fix missing avatars and add docs link

- Add custom avatar support in shoutouts page
- Add Twitter avatar URLs for artpi, nateliason, kandros5591
- Add link to docs showcase page at bottom of showcase
- Add @0xLCZ tweet to showcase
